decisions.title: Publish Q1 Market Research Summary
decisions.reason: Strong synthesis, clean sector breakdown, ready for distribution to the analyst list.

decisions.title: Archive 2024 content tree without review
decisions.reason: Premature — several 2024 pieces are still referenced by active research briefs.

decisions.title: Adopt GPT-4o for fast-path research queries
decisions.reason: Latency win on short-form lookups with acceptable accuracy on benchmark set.

decisions.title: Switch newsletter tone to first-person voice
decisions.reason: Awaiting editor review round before council can finalize.

decisions.title: Expand Research Agent tool set with code execution
decisions.reason: Sandbox constraints not yet met; revisit after Phase 10 infra work.

decisions.title: Promote Weekly Market Roundup to flagship newsletter
decisions.reason: Consistent engagement across the last eight issues; highest client-facing retention.
